evidence.page_title: How to pronounce AISLE in English - Cambridge Dictionary
evidence.title: How to pronounce AISLE in English
evidence.description: How to pronounce AISLE. How to say AISLE. Listen to the audio pronunciation in the Cambridge English Dictionary. Learn more.
evidence.text:
English pronunciation of aisle
aisle
How to pronounce aisle
UK/aɪl/
US/aɪl/
UK/aɪl/ aisle
- /aɪ/ as in eye
- /l/ as in look
US/aɪl/ aisle
- /aɪ/ as in eye
- /l/ as in look
(English pronunciations of aisle from the Cambridge Advanced Learner's Dictionary & Thesaurus and from the Cambridge Academic Content Dictionary, both sources © Cambridge University Press)
